title: message_set: reply_to and thread_root_id fields are unbounded strings
description: In daemon/src/jmap.rs message_set create path (lines 1905-1912), reply_to and thread_root_id are extracted from the JSON body as arbitrary-length strings with no size cap before being passed to insert_message_ext() and stored in SQLite. A hostile client can supply a multi-megabyte reply_to or thread_root_id. The body field is capped at 65536 bytes, but these two fields are not. Fix: add a length cap (e.g. 128 or 256 bytes, matching deserialize_bounded_id) on both fields before the get_chats() call, returning invalidProperties if exceeded.
